query:
insert or replace into ResolvedTestCaseStatementCoverage (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                test_run_name,
                test_run_date,
                test_case_name,
                stmnt_filepath,
                stmnt_line,
                hits
            )
            with TestCaseStatementsWithoutOverrides (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                test_run_name,
                test_run_date,
                test_case_name,
                stmnt_filepath,
                stmnt_line
            ) as (
                select
                    last_collect_nr,
                    product_id,
                    test_run_name,
                    test_run_date,
                    test_case_name,
                    stmnt_filepath,
                    stmnt_line
                from TestCaseStatementCoverage
                where last_collect_nr = $1 and product_id = $2
                except
                select
                    last_collect_nr,
                    product_id,
                    test_run_name,
                    test_run_date,
                    test_case_name,
                    stmnt_filepath,
                    stmnt_line
                from TestCaseStatementCoverageOverrides
                where last_collect_nr = $1 and product_id = $2
            )
            select
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                test_run_name,
                test_run_date,
                test_case_name,
                stmnt_filepath,
                stmnt_line,
                hits
            from TestCaseStatementCoverageOverrides
            where last_collect_nr = $1 and product_id = $2
            union all
            select
                t.last_collect_nr,
                t.product_id,
                t.test_run_name,
                t.test_run_date,
                t.test_case_name,
                t.stmnt_filepath,
                t.stmnt_line,
                t.hits
            from TestCaseStatementsWithoutOverrides wo, TestCaseStatementCoverage t
            where wo.last_collect_nr = t.last_collect_nr
                and wo.product_id = t.product_id
                and wo.test_run_name = t.test_run_name
                and wo.test_run_date = t.test_run_date
                and wo.test_case_name = t.test_case_name
                and wo.stmnt_filepath = t.stmnt_filepath
                and wo.stmnt_line = t.stmnt_line
